data.id: TR-PICUS-PERSIST-001: Scheduled Task Creation via PowerShell Register-ScheduledTask
data.name: TR-PICUS-PERSIST-001: Scheduled Task Creation via PowerShell Register-ScheduledTask
data.description: Detects scheduled task creation via PowerShell's Register-ScheduledTask cmdlet or New-ScheduledTask. This is a common persistence mechanism used by attackers. Monitoring for this behavior helps detect post-exploitation persistence techniques. MITRE T1053.005.
data.contents: (process.name contains 'powershell.exe' OR process.name contains 'pwsh.exe') AND (process.command_line contains 'Register-ScheduledTask' OR process.command_line contains 'New-ScheduledTask' OR process.command_line contains 'New-ScheduledTaskAction' OR process.command_line contains 'New-ScheduledTaskTrigger' OR process.command_line contains 'schtasks.exe /create')
